text: Sealing of HP casing assembly (1 set should comprise of sealing 1 set segments, fitted keys, pins, caulking material and interstage sealings of all the stationary rows) vi) Sealing of HP inlet and HP e xhaust assembly (sealing rings, 1set lockwashers, connecting nuts/ capnuts between pipe and casing) vii) HP turbine first stage stationary and moving blades with 1 set assembly material viii) HP outer and inner casing fasteners and fixing materials 20% of each type and size ix) HP/IP combined thrust and journal bearing (complete with 1 set torous, intermediate pieces so le/base plate and all other fixing / assembly materials required to complete thrust and journal bearings assembly except housing) x) HP/IP pedestal oil guard ring (complete set of oil guard 1 set assembly for front and rear with fixing material) xi) HP/IP shaft coupling bolts, nuts, lock washers, 1 set pins, screws, coupling guards xii) Sealing of IP casing assembly (1 set should consist of 1 set sealing segments, fitted keys, caulking material, pins, cap screws and interstage sealing of all the stationary rows) xiii) IP turbine shaft seals (complete set of interstage seals of 1 set all the stages of moving blades of IP rotor with fixing material) Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 29 xiv) IP shaft gland seals (complete set for replacement of front 1 set and rear with fixing material) xv) IP turbine first stage stationary and moving blades with 1 set assembly materials xvi) IP outer and inner casing fasteners and fixing materials 20% of each type and size xvii) IP/LP journal bearing (complete with torous, intermediate 1 set pieces sole/base plate and all other fixing/assembly materials required to complete one bearing assembly except housing) xviii) IP/LP pedestal oil guard rings (complete set of oil guard 1 set Assembly for front and rear with fixing material) xix) IP/LP shaft coupling bolts, lock-washers, nuts, pins, screws, 1 set coupling guards xx) LP turbine rear bearing (complete set of bearing assembly 1 set including torous, intermediate pieces sole/base plate and all other fixing/assembly materials required to complete one bearing assembly without housing) xxi) LP turbine atmospheric diaphragm (complete set 1 set for replacement of one diaphragm assembly) xxii) LP shaft seals (complete set of interstage seals of 1 set all the stages of LP rotor with fixing materials)
